parameters.jsonBody:
={"model":"anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are an n8n workflow error classifier. Given an error message and context, classify it into exactly one category and provide a recovery recommendation.

Categories:
1. auto_retry - Transient errors that will likely succeed on retry (connection timeouts, ECONNRESET, temporary 5xx server errors, Airtable rate limits)
2. deactivate_reactivate - Errors requiring a workflow restart (webhook stuck, listener not responding, trigger registration failures)
3. delay_retry - Errors requiring a wait period before retry (429 rate limits, Gmail quota exceeded, API daily limits)
4. needs_human - Errors requiring human intervention (expired credentials, 401/403 auth errors, code syntax errors, missing required fields, data validation failures, schema changes)
5. unknown - Cannot confidently classify

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no markdown:
{"category": "<one of 5>", "confidence": <0.0-1.0>, "explanation": "<brief>", "suggested_action": "<action>", "wait_seconds": <0 if n/a>, "retry_count": <1-3>}"},{"role":"user","content":"Error in workflow '{{ $json.workflowName }}' at node '{{ $json.errorNode }}':
{{ $json.errorMessage }}

Pre-classification hint: {{ $json.hintCategory }}"}],"temperature":0.1,"max_tokens":300}

parameters.jsCode:
// Build HTML alert email for human-intervention errors const data = $input.first().json; const instanceName = 'AnyVision Production'; const severityColor = data.category === 'needs_human' ? '#dc2626' : '#f59e0b'; const severityLabel = data.category === 'needs_human' ? 'REQUIRES ACTION' : 'UNKNOWN ERROR'; // Check if this is an escalation from a failed auto-fix const isEscalation = data.fixAction === 'retried' || data.fixAction === 'delayed_retry'; const escalationNote = isEscalation ? '

This error was initially classified as auto-fixable, but the automated fix failed. Manual intervention is now required.

' : ''; const html = '' + '' + '' + '' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + '
' + '

Self-Healing Alert

' + '

' + severityLabel + '

' + '
' + escalationNote + '
' + '

' + ' Workflow: ' + data.workflowName + '
' + ' Failed Node: ' + data.errorNode + '
' + ' Time: ' + data.timestamp + '
' + ' Category: ' + data.category + '
' + ' Confidence: ' + Math.round((data.confidence || 0) * 100) + '%' + '

' + '
' + '

Error Message:

' + '
' + data.errorMessage + '
' + '

AI Analysis:

' + '

' + data.explanation + '

' + (data.executionUrl ? '

View Execution in n8n

' : '') + '
' + '

' + ' AnyVision Media Self-Healing Monitor | ' + instanceName + '
' + ' This error could not be auto-resolved. Manual intervention required.' + '

' + '
' + '' + ''; return { json: { ...data, alertHtml: html, alertSubject: '[SELF-HEALING] ' + severityLabel + ': ' + data.workflowName + ' - ' + data.errorNode, fixAction: isEscalation ? data.fixAction + '_escalated' : 'alerted_human', fixResult: 'pending', fixDescription: isEscalation ? 'Auto-fix failed, escalated to human via email' : 'Sent alert email - requires manual intervention', } };

// Build HTML health report email const data = $input.first().json; const instanceName = 'AnyVision Production'; const problematicRows = (data.problematicWorkflows || []).map(w => '' + '' + w.name + '' + '' + w.count + '' + '' + (w.lastError || 'N/A') + '' + '' ).join(''); const suspiciousRows = (data.suspiciousInactive || []).map(w => '' + '' + w.name + '' + '' + w.id + '' + '' ).join(''); const statusColor = data.hasIssues ? '#dc2626' : '#22c55e'; const html = '' + '' + '' + '' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + '
' + '

Health Check Report

' + '

' + (data.hasIssues ? 'ISSUES DETECTED' : 'ALL CLEAR') + '

' + '
' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + '
' + '

' + data.activeWorkflows + '

' + '

Active

' + ' 		' + '

' + data.inactiveWorkflows + '

' + '

Inactive

' + ' 		' + '

' + data.recentErrorCount + '

' + '

Recent Errors

' + '
' + (problematicRows ? ( '

Problematic Workflows

' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + problematicRows + '
WorkflowErrorsLast Error
') : '') + (suspiciousRows ? ( '

Potentially Inactive Workflows

' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + ' ' + suspiciousRows + '
WorkflowID
') : '') + '

Checked: ' + data.checkedAt + '

' + '
' + '

AnyVision Media Self-Healing Monitor | ' + instanceName + '

' + '
' + '' + ''; return { json: { ...data, reportHtml: html, reportSubject: '[HEALTH CHECK] ' + (data.hasIssues ? 'ISSUES DETECTED' : 'ALL CLEAR') + ' - ' + data.totalWorkflows + ' workflows, ' + data.recentErrorCount + ' errors', } };
